title: Item Id Copy
description: A Forge mod which allows to copy item ids from inventory - Perfect for creators!
body:
ItemIdCopy is a Minecraft mod that allows you to copy item ids from inventories with the key combination Ctrl + C

The perfect tool for creators!

_At least it's useful for me..._





![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/793d2ab65d5640323f1840df56fa9d4fbc9d1c69_0.webp)
